cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.2.3)
set(CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "")
set(_CMAKE_CHECK_ENABLED_LANGUAGES "ASM;CXX")
set(CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER "/opt/gcc-fsf-gnat/bin/c++")
set(CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_ID "GNU")
set(CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_LOADED 1)
set(CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_VERSION "")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER "/opt/gcc-fsf-gnat/bin/c++")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID "GNU")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LOADED 1)
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_VERSION "11.3.0")

project(CheckCUDA LANGUAGES CUDA)
file(WRITE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/result.cmake" "set(CMAKE_CUDA_COMPILER \"${CMAKE_CUDA_COMPILER}\")
set(CMAKE_CUDA_HOST_COMPILER \"${CMAKE_CUDA_HOST_COMPILER}\")
")
